Astrogem Full Pipeline: Time to Complete 24

How to Read This Table

Baseline

Score of your weakest equipped astrogem:
WP: (4−lvl)×2.4 | O/C: (lvl−4)×5.14 | AddDmg: lvl×1.85 | BossDmg: lvl×2.55 | ATK: lvl×1
New gems must exceed this score to be an upgrade.

Gem Cells

Header shows weighted EV across all buckets. 4 rows below: 2D (2 dmg stats) | Op (best 1 dmg) | Sub (worse 1 dmg) | No (0 dmg).
Each row: gold EV (left) and % above baseline (right).

Colors & Icons

Green (≥20k) — worth resetting if below BL (↻)
Yellow–Dim (>0) — worth cutting, not resetting
Red (≤0) — do not cut
Purple — fuse pre-cutting
↻ Reset if below BL (20k gold, one retry, same bucket).

How to Use

Step 1: Decide on your gold per 1% damage. Refer to this video guide.

Step 2: Decide your baseline. Either use your total score or the weeks to complete to decide.

Step 3: Read the row. Red = don’t cut. Purple = fuse before cutting. Green with ↻ = reset if below baseline. Yellow/dim = cut but don’t reset. Pipeline columns show weekly gem production, time to complete, and expected final score.

Week estimate is based on vendor + dailies alone. Does not take into account paradise, events, or F4 shop.

Pipeline

Boxes — Which astrogem boxes to buy each week (if +EV).
Box EV — Expected gold value of one random box gem.
Direct — Above-BL gems/week from cutting (includes resets).
Fusion — Above-BL gems/week from post-cut L/R/A fusion.
Total — Direct + Fusion. Total above-BL gems produced per week.
Weeks — 24 ÷ Total/wk. Estimated weeks to fill all 24 slots. ≤8 8–26 >26
Gold — Total gold/week = boxes + cutting + resets + fusing.
Avg Score — Expected average score of each of the 24 gems when complete.
Total Score — 24 × Avg Score − 2.4×6 − 5.14×6. Sum of all 24 gem scores minus base WP+Order contributions.
cp% gain — 1.300×(1+TotalScore/3096)−1. Estimated combat power percentage gain.

Pre-Cut Fusion

3 UC same cost → 85% UC / 13.5% Rare / 1.5% Epic. 500g. 50% RB.
1R + 2UC optimal cost → 52% UC / 44% Rare / 4% Epic. 500g. 50% RB.
Purple cells indicate when fusing beats cutting directly.

Post-Cut Fusion (500g each)

A+2L → 35L/40R/25A | R+2L → 73L/25R/2A | 3L → 99L/1R
Priority: A+2L, then R+2L, then 3L. Below-BL outputs recycled.
See fusion value tables below each tier for fodder values and best legendary cost to fuse with.

500k gold / 1% damage
